message:
🌱 istio: Istio Ambient mode - Routing egress traffic to wildcard destinations (#1140)

* 🌱 Add istio: Istio Ambient mode - Routing egress traffic to wildcard mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: correct istio namespace to istio-system

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "istio-54540-istio-ambient-mode-routing-egress-traffic-to-wildcard-destinations",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "istio: Istio Ambient mode - Routing egress traffic to wildcard destinations",
+    "description": "Istio Ambient mode - Routing egress traffic to wildcard destinations. Requested by 15+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current istio deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your istio version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio\nhelm list -n istio-system 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working istio installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review istio configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant istio configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio\nkubectl get configmap -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=istio\n```\n### Is this the right place to submit this?\n\n- [X] This is not a security vulnerability or a crashing bug\n- [X] This is not a question about how to use Istio\n\n### Bug Description\n\nHi Team,\n\nWe are planing to use istio ambient mode to route egress"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Istio Ambient mode - Routing egress traffic to wildcard…",
+        "description": "We have similar use cases using 3rd party tools where we don't have a list of hostnames they need access to. For instance https://external-secrets.io/latest/ it took looking through various logs to find the ip addresses and hostnames that needed to be created as service entries to allow external\n```yaml\napiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1\nkind: ServiceEntry\nmetadata:\n  name: wildcard\n  namespace: common-infrastructure\nspec:\n  hosts:\n    - \"*.com\"\n    - \"*.net\"\n    - \"*.org\"\n    - \"*.io\"\n  ports:\n  - number: 80\n    name: http\n    protocol: HTTP\n  resolution: DNS\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio\nkubectl get events -n istio-system --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Istio Ambient mode - Routing egress traffic to wildcard…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "We have similar use cases using 3rd party tools where we don't have a list of hostnames they need access to. For instance https://external-secrets.io/latest/ it took looking through various logs to find the ip addresses and hostnames that needed to be created as service entries to allow external secrets to work correctly.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1\nkind: ServiceEntry\nmetadata:\n  name: wildcard\n  namespace: common-infrastructure\nspec:\n  hosts:\n    - \"*.com\"\n    - \"*.net\"\n    - \"*.org\"\n    - \"*.io\"\n  ports:\n  - number: 80\n    name: http\n    protocol: HTTP\n  resolution: DNS"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
